[`ProductionHttpRuntimeIntegrationTest.java`](../../tests/integration-tests/src/test/java/com/voicesecure/integration/ProductionHttpRuntimeIntegrationTest.java) | The production HTTP process now composes PostgreSQL repositories and recovery workers, Redis limiting, Kafka outbox publication, OIDC/JWKS verification, remote risk/voice/account-directory boundaries, structured telemetry, and idempotent settlement. A disposable PostgreSQL/Redis/Redpanda test proves the trusted voice callback atomically consumes a reservation, posts the balanced ledger transfer, completes the payment, publishes outbox events, and recovers after restart. Managed AWS deployment, multi-instance fault injection, fallback settlement, and production telemetry history remain unproven. | api-platform |

Terms such as production, durable, ready, implemented, or validated describe a scoped target unless the registry status and linked evidence prove that maturity level.
